reviews.review_description: I love the idea. But fighting the dumby my left arm kept sticking in place when doing windshield wiper movement horizontally,and I can't slow my movements bc the dumby is very fast. I tried using elbows to block and my arm stuck. The NPC dumby can kick but I cannot, I'ma throw a show at em...

developer_response.body: We appreciate your patience and support! The game now has a newer version with many improvements and fixes. Please update to the latest version for a smoother and more enjoyable experience. Thank you for your valuable feedback!

reviews.review_description: A truly thrilling VR game! The best part about this simulation program is that you can practice martial arts anywhere. Other than my martial arts practice, I truly liked the archery part of SetVR-XL.
Enjoyed playing the fighting and shooting gallery.
